title: Changing colors of tasks/subitems in a calendar that's pulling data from multiple boards.
excerpt: I want to change the colors of tasks and subitems in a calendar that’s pulling data from multiple boards. The darker colors (greens and blues, for example) make it harder to read text. An ability to select colors would b…

posts.author: Alfred1 (Alfred Hille)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to change the colors of tasks and subitems in a calendar that’s pulling data from multiple boards. The darker colors (greens and blues, for example) make it harder to read text. An ability to select colors would be helpful rather than rely on automated, random selection. I uploaded a visual to illustrate. Thank you.

visual21122×159 18.3 KB
